ddls:
CREATE TABLE "movies" (
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each movie */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the movie */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry of the movie (e.g., Bollywood, Hollywood) */,
  "release_year" INTEGER /* Year the movie was released */,
  "imdb_rating" REAL /* IMDb rating of the movie */,
  "studio_id" INTEGER /* ID of the studio that produced the movie */,
  "language_id" INTEGER /* ID of the language in which the movie was produced */,
  "runtime" INTEGER /* Runtime of the movie in minutes */,
  "budget" REAL /* Budget of the movie in millions */,
  "box_office" REAL /* Box office performance in millions */,
  "certification" TEXT /* Certification (e.g., PG, R) */,
  "synopsis" TEXT /* Brief description of the movie */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of production */,
  "director_id" INTEGER /* ID of the primary director */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("movie_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_movies_language_id FOREIGN KEY ("language_id") REFERENCES languages ("language_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_movies_director_id FOREIGN KEY ("director_id") REFERENCES directors ("director_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_movies_studio_id FOREIGN KEY ("studio_id") REFERENCES studios ("studio_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "studios" (
  "studio_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each studio */,
  "studio_name" TEXT /* Name of the studio */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the studio */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the studio */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the studio */,
  "website" TEXT /* Official website of the studio */,
  "founded" INTEGER /* Year the studio was founded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("studio_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "languages" (
  "language_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each language */,
  "language_name" TEXT /* Name of the language */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the language is primarily spoken */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("language_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genres" (
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each genre */,
  "genre_name" TEXT /* Name of the genre */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the genre */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "movie_genres" (
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie */,
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* ID of the genre */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("movie_id", "genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user account */,
  "full_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the user */,
  "profile_picture_url" TEXT /* URL of the user's profile picture */,
  "join_date" TEXT /* Date the user joined the platform */,
  "biography" TEXT /* Brief biography of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_followers" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "follower_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user they follow */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "follower_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie being rated */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user giving the rating */,
  "rating" REAL /* Rating given by the user */,
  "rating_date" TEXT /* Date the rating was given */,
  "review_id" INTEGER /* ID of the review if the user provided a review along with the rating */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ratings_review_id FOREIGN KEY ("review_id") REFERENCES reviews ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ratings_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ratings_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("movie_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie being reviewed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user giving the review */,
  "review" TEXT /* Review given by the user */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date the review was given */,
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* ID of the rating if the user provided a rating along with the review */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_rating_id FOREIGN KEY ("rating_id") REFERENCES ratings ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("movie_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "review_id" INTEGER /* ID of the review being commented on */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user giving the comment */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Comment given by the user */,
  "comment_date" TEXT /* Date the comment was given */,
  "parent_comment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent comment if this is a nested comment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_parent_comment_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_comment_id") REFERENCES comments ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_review_id FOREIGN KEY ("review_id") REFERENCES reviews ("review_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "movie_images" (
  "image_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each image */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie the image is related to */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the image */,
  "image_type" TEXT /* Type of image (e.g., poster, still, behind-the-scenes) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("image_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_movie_images_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("movie_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trailer_urls" (
  "trailer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trailer URL */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie the trailer URL is related to */,
  "trailer_url" TEXT /* URL of the trailer */,
  "trailer_type" TEXT /* Type of trailer (e.g., official, teaser) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trailer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trailer_urls_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("movie_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "casts" (
  "cast_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cast member */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie the cast member is related to */,
  "actor_name" TEXT /* Name of the actor */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role played by the actor */,
  "character_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the character played by the actor */,
  "actor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the actor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cast_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_casts_actor_id FOREIGN KEY ("actor_id") REFERENCES actors ("actor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_casts_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("movie_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "crew" (
  "crew_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each crew member */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie the crew member is related to */,
  "crew_member_name" TEXT /* Name of the crew member */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role played by the crew member */,
  "crew_member_id" INTEGER /* ID of the crew member */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("crew_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_crew_crew_member_id FOREIGN KEY ("crew_member_id") REFERENCES crew_members ("crew_member_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_crew_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("movie_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "directors" (
  "director_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each director */,
  "director_name" TEXT /* Name of the director */,
  "biography" TEXT /* Brief biography of the director */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the director */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the director */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("director_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "actors" (
  "actor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each actor */,
  "actor_name" TEXT /* Name of the actor */,
  "biography" TEXT /* Brief biography of the actor */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the actor */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the actor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("actor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "crew_members" (
  "crew_member_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each crew member */,
  "crew_member_name" TEXT /* Name of the crew member */,
  "biography" TEXT /* Brief biography of the crew member */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the crew member */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the crew member */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("crew_member_id")
)
